reason: This finding involves enabling the pam_faillock.so module for account lockout protection, which is a standard STIG hardening measure. The remediation script uses authselect when available, which is the supported method for managing PAM configurations on modern RHEL systems. The script includes integrity checks and falls back to manual edits only when authselect is not present. This is a well-established security control that does not modify critical system partitions or boot configuration.
